emptyState.signInCaption: Keep your diagrams in Google Drive
emptyState.signInStripCaption: Save your diagrams to Google Drive — or continue in this session and move them to Drive anytime.

fileExplorer.title: Diagrams
fileExplorer.empty: No diagrams yet. Create one to get started.
fileExplorer.moveToDriveFailed: Could not move "{{name}}" to Google Drive — it stayed in this session

status.sessionStorageNote: Session storage only - export to save permanently
status.sessionBanner: Your work lives in this browser tab only. Use Export → Export project to keep it.
status.sessionBannerSignIn: Sign in to save to Google Drive

disabled.needsServerStorage: Share requires server storage. Run Axoview self-hosted (Docker) or on Cloudflare to enable shareable links.
disabled.needsDiagram: Open or create a diagram first to share it.

share.title: Share Diagram
share.hint: Anyone with this link can view the diagram in read-only mode.

save.title: Save Diagram (Current Session Only)
save.warningMessage: This save is temporary and will be lost when you close the browser.
save.warningExport: Use Export File to permanently save your work.

saveAs.title: Save Diagram
saveAs.subtitle: Choose a name to save this diagram.

load.title: Load Diagram (Current Session Only)
load.noteMessage: These saves are temporary. Export your diagrams to keep them permanently.
load.noSavedDiagrams: No saved diagrams found in this session

export.title: Export Diagram
export.recommendedMessage: This is the best way to save your work permanently.
export.noteMessage: Exported JSON files can be imported later or shared with others.

localModeShareError.headline: This share link needs a session backend.
localModeShareError.body: Share links can only be opened from an Axoview instance running with server storage. Deploy via Docker or Cloudflare to view shared diagrams.

readonlyLoadError.headline: Could not open this diagram.
readonlyLoadError.body: The diagram may have been deleted, or you may not have access to it.

publicShareLoadError.headline: Could not open this shared diagram.
publicShareLoadError.body: The share link may have expired, been revoked, or the diagram may no longer exist.

saveError.headline: Couldn't save.
saveError.body: Your changes weren't saved. Browser storage may be full. Try clearing space and saving again.

importError.headline: Couldn't import.
importError.body: This file isn't a valid Axoview diagram. Make sure it's a .json or .zip exported from Axoview.

shareError.headline: Couldn't create share link.
shareError.body: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

diagramManager.title: Open Diagram
diagramManager.noSavedHint: Save your current diagram to get started

alert.diagramExists: A diagram named "{{name}}" already exists in this session. This will overwrite it. Are you sure you want to continue?
alert.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Continue loading?
alert.unsavedChangesExport: You have unsaved changes. Export your diagram first to save it. Continue?
alert.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this diagram?
alert.autoSaveFailed: Storage full! Please use Storage Manager to free up space.
alert.beforeUnload: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
alert.quotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Please export important diagrams and clear some space.

auth.signInHint: Keep your diagrams in Google Drive — available anywhere you sign in.
auth.reconnectTooltip: Google sign-in needed — your Drive diagrams reconnect with one click
auth.reconnectHint: Signed out of Google — sign in again to use Drive

places.driveSignInRow: Sign in to connect Google Drive
places.driveReconnectRow: Reconnect to load your Drive diagrams

migrate.title: Move session diagrams to Google Drive?
migrate.body: These diagrams live only in this browser tab and are lost when it closes:
migrate.destinationNote: They will move into your Drive folder, keeping their folders.
migrate.partialToast: {{moved}} moved, {{failed}} failed — the failed diagrams stayed in this session
